title: Save the Kingdom - Warrior Rising
description:
Save the Kingdom: Warrior Rising is a 2D hand‑drawn RPG set in the medieval kingdom of Aethelgard, where political tension and betrayal threaten to ignite a devastating war. After the new king, Farn, ascends the throne, his older brother Tod Ulfrikson, furious that the crown slipped from his grasp, secretly allies with the powerful Hrun Khanate and prepares to launch an invasion.

You play as Bryn Kelwyn, an ordinary young man who enlists in the royal army alongside his childhood friends. What begins as a duty to defend their homeland soon grows into an epic journey filled with danger, camaraderie, and the rise of unexpected heroes. As the conflict deepens, Bryn and his companions uncover hidden truths about the kingdom, the royal bloodline, and the forces driving the war.

Key Features• A Story of War and Brotherhood Follow Bryn and his friends as they face the harsh realities of war, political intrigue, and the weight of destiny.

• Five Distinct Playable Classes Build your team from the Archer, Warrior, Mage, Musketeer, and Doctor — each offering unique abilities and tactical roles.

• Strategic Turn‑Based Combat Plan your moves carefully, exploit enemy weaknesses, and combine skills for powerful synergies.

• Hand‑Drawn Anime Art Style Explore a visually rich medieval world illustrated with detailed 2D artwork and atmospheric environments.

• Character Growth & Equipment Level up, unlock new abilities, and craft or discover gear that enhances your heroes’ strengths.

• Explore the Kingdom of Aethelgard Travel through forests, towns, fortresses, and battlefields as you uncover the truth behind Tod Ulfrikson’s rebellion and the looming threat of the Hrun Khanate.

Embark on a journey where ordinary soldiers become legends, and the fate of Aethelgard rests in the hands of rising heroes.
description_short: A 2D hand‑drawn medieval RPG where Bryn Kelwyn and his friends join the army of Aethelgard to resist Tod Ulfrikson’s rebellion and the invading Hrun Khanate, rising as heroes through tactical battles and story‑driven adventure.
